title: Nandyal Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting Nandyal with a Z-Score of +3.57. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Nandyal has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The temperature is significantly higher than usual, with a CDD of 11.5 GG and a relative humidity of 60%. 
 The wind speed is relatively low at 5.9 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the heat wave's impact.
